arabic_text:
کرۃ النار
حرارت + یبوست
کرۃ الھوا
حرارت + رطوبت
کرۃ المآء
برودت + رطوبت
کرۃ الأرض
برودت + یبوست
english_text:
Sphere of Fire — Extreme Heat + Extreme Dryness
Sphere of Air — Moderate Heat + Moderate Moisture
Sphere of Water — Moderate Cold + Moderate Moisture
Sphere of Earth — Extreme Cold + Extreme Dryness
alt_text: A 2×2 table mapping the four elemental spheres to their qualitative pairs. Top-right cell: کرۃ النار (Fire) = حرارت + یبوست (Extreme Heat + Extreme Dryness). Top-left: کرۃ الھوا (Air) = حرارت + رطوبت (Moderate Heat + Moderate Moisture). Bottom-right: کرۃ المآء (Water) = برودت + رطوبت (Moderate Cold + Moderate Moisture). Bottom-left: کرۃ الأرض (Earth) = برودت + یبوست (Extreme Cold + Extreme Dryness).
notes: Compact reference table of the qualitative profile of each elemental sphere. Distinguishes 'Extreme' vs 'Moderate' degrees for each hot/cold and dry/wet pair.
